text:
Market today: Cautious tone. The real driver is Cleveland Fed's Hammack warning AI could fuel inflation and force rate hikes. That's direct pressure on growth/tech multiples - exactly your book. Higher-for-longer kills the sector that's carrying your P&L.

Your holdings: PTNM is down -15.25% and sitting just above its $9.50 stop - on margin, a spec this close to the line needs a hard decision now. SPCX is a brand-new, very volatile IPO with limited price history; it's up 3.43% but margin amplifies any sudden drop hard. SOXL at +4.67% is 3x leveraged semis - a rate-hike headline like today's can cut it fast.

Watch: 1) Whether the Fed rate-hike narrative gets reinforced by more speakers - that's the pin in your tech balloon. 2) SOXL and SMH price action; semis are most exposed if rates-up fear spreads.

Bottom line: Protect what you have - the Fed inflation/rate warning is the one headline that can hurt your entire concentrated book at once.
plays: PTNM: It's -15.25% and $0.89 from your stop on margin. Decide now - honor the $9.50 stop or cut it manually before it forces you out ugly.
SOXL: Rate-hike fears hit 3x leveraged semis hardest. Consider trimming size or tightening your stop above $200 given today's Fed tone.
No new buys today - macro headwind from the Fed rate comment argues for sitting tight, not adding exposure.
